visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a high-angle close-up of a decorative manhole cover embedded in a red-brick sidewalk. The cover features a colorful illustration of Maetel from 'Galaxy Express 999'. The lighting is bright and natural daylight, showing the metallic texture of the cover. (2) A person's hand enters the frame, holding a collectible card that displays the same manhole cover artwork. The hand moves the card to align with the physical cover on the ground, demonstrating a match. (3) The scene transitions to the person holding a different card with a floral manhole design, then another featuring a phoenix-like bird against a red and white building background. The shots are tight close-ups focusing on the physical texture and printing quality of the cards. (4) An Asian man with dyed reddish-brown hair appears in a medium shot. He is wearing a white t-shirt and a khaki tactical utility vest. He is standing in a modern, brightly lit building lobby with glass windows and people walking in the distance. He speaks expressively with hand gestures. (5) The camera shows a digital screen recording of a Japanese website listing manhole cards, followed by the man pointing to an information desk labeled 'Fukuoka City Information Plaza'. A staff member in a black shirt and mask is visible behind the counter in the background. (6) Close-up shots show the front and back of a card featuring the 'Fukuoka SoftBank Hawks' mascot. The back of the card clearly displays coordinates and a QR code. The man then holds multiple cards toward the camera, smiling and gesturing enthusiastically in the lobby setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 很多人都知道. [Logo]: @yga0721. (2) [Subtitle]: 日本有些水溝蓋是彩繪的. (3) [Subtitle]: 對對對很可愛的那種. (4) [Subtitle]: 他有的會跟動漫的IP聯名. (5) [Subtitle]: 或者他有當地的一些吉祥物. (6) [Subtitle]: 還是風土民情. (7) [Subtitle]: 他會做成水溝蓋. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後呢. (9) [Subtitle]: 他有固定的地方可以拿水溝蓋卡片. (10) [Subtitle]: 水溝蓋卡片. (11) [Subtitle]: 你現在在哪一個縣. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後查詢出來就啪啪啪啪. (13) [Subtitle]: 哪裡有. (14) [Subtitle]: 它很難搜哦. (15) [Subtitle]: 它在哪裡. (16) [Subtitle]: 福岡市役所. [Variety]: 福岡市役所. (17) [Subtitle]: 在一樓的什麼觀光案內所. (18) [Subtitle]: 直接去跟他拿就好. (19) [Subtitle]: 示範給大家看哦. (20) [Logo]: 情報プラザ. (21) [Subtitle]: 就這麼簡單. (22) [Subtitle]: 來來來 帥. (23) [Subtitle]: 帥呆了. [Variety]: 卡片質感很好. (24) [Subtitle]: 就這樣. (25) [Subtitle]: 然後這邊呢 它都會附上. (26) [Subtitle]: 喔 這個水溝蓋的經緯度地址. (27) [Subtitle]: 經緯度. (28) [Subtitle]: 如果你想去跟他本人. (29) [Subtitle]: 本蓋拍照的話. (30) [Subtitle]: 你就可以拿著去跟他拍照. (31) [Subtitle]: 經緯度搜尋 找到. (32) [Subtitle]: 後面就有關於這個水溝蓋的一些故事. (33) [Subtitle]: 如果有搜到 可以跟嘎哥分享一下. (34) [Subtitle]: 嘎哥推坑 水溝蓋卡片! [Variety]: 水溝蓋卡片 推坑!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female interviewer partially visible off-camera, and 2 staff/passers-by in the background lobby.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Asian male with dyed reddish-brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt and a khaki tactical utility vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video shifts between a brick-paved urban sidewalk and the interior of the Fukuoka City Information Plaza, featuring modern office aesthetics and informative displays.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, high-tempo electronic EDM track featuring bright synthesizers and a sharp, consistent beat. A male speaker introduces the topic with high energy, characterized by rapid speech and varied pitch. (2) A subtle rustling sound of paper is audible as the speaker displays different cards. The music provides a continuous, energetic backdrop without overpowering the vocals. (3) A digital 'pop' sound effect marks a scene transition, and the speaker's tone remains friendly and highly animated. (4) The acoustic texture shifts slightly to include a low-level indoor room tone, suggesting a transition into a public building lobby. A few distant echoes of background chatter are perceptible. (5) A 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a fast edit to a screen capture. The male voice maintains a dominant presence, explaining technical details like coordinates with clarity. (6) A short clip of a female voice laughing and responding is heard, adding a conversational layer to the mix. (7) The video concludes with the male speaker delivering a high-arousal summary, with the BGM rhythmically syncing to his final words before a clean cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Demonstration -> Guide -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce the cultural phenomenon of collectible manhole cover cards in Japan, specifically guiding viewers on how to locate and obtain them at the Fukuoka City Information Plaza using digital resources and physical coordinates.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses social-media editing styles and high-energy narration to promote a niche Japanese hobby.
